session.summary: A small plan-driven desktop trace using app activation, typing, keyboard shortcuts, and observation.

actions.label: activate-textedit
notes: Bring TextEdit to the foreground before typing.

actions.label: new-document
actions.expectedResult: A new document window is ready.

actions.label: type-demo-text
actions.expectedResult: The demo text appears in the editor.

actions.label: save-shortcut
notes: This step is useful for editor workflows even if a dialog appears.
